name: I-Aspirin (i-Acetylsalicylic Acid)
description: Isidakamizwa esingeyona i-steroidal anti-inflammatory (NSAID) esinezici ze-antiplatelet. Ukwelashwa komugqa wokuqala we- suspected acute coronary syndrome (ACS). Ivimbela ngokungenakulungiseka ukuhlangana kweplatelet -- umphumela uhlala isikhathi eside seplatelet (izinsuku eziyi-7-10).
indications: Okusolwa ukuthi i-acute myocardial infarction (MI) -- hlafuna ngokushesha
dose: I-ACS: 325 mg PO -- Hlafuna (ungagwinyi uphelele) ngokushesha. I-analgesic/antipyretic: 325-650 mg PO q4-6h PRN.
window: I-ACS: Nikeza ngokushesha ngangokunokwenzeka -- hlafuna ngokushesha lapho usola.
contraindications: I-aspirin eyaziwa ngokuthi i-allergies noma i-NSAID hypersensitivity
Ukopha kakhulu okungalawuleki -- i-aspirin yenza ukopha kube kubi kakhulu
warnings: UNGANIKEZI ezigulini ezinokopha -- i-aspirin iphazamisa ngendlela engenakulungiseka ukusebenza kweplatelet futhi yenza ukopha kube kubi kakhulu.
UNGAZIniki izingane ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-12 ezinesifo esibangelwa amagciwane -- ingozi ye-Reye's syndrome.
Ukucasuka kwe-GI -- thatha nokudla uma kungaphumi.

pediatric.dose: I-analgesic/antipyretic: 10-15 mg/kg PO q4-6h (ubukhulu obungu-650 mg/umthamo). QAPHELA: Contraindicated in viral disease (Reye syndrome).
pediatric.note: Sebenzisa i-acetaminophen (paracetamol) yemfiva ezinganeni ezinesifo esibangelwa amagciwane esikhundleni salokho.

obstetric.note: Gwema ekukhulelweni ikakhulukazi ku-trimester yesithathu (ukuvalwa ngaphambi kwesikhathi kwe-ductus arteriosus). Umthamo ophansi (81mg) usetshenziselwa ukuvimbela i-pre-eclampsia ngaphansi kokuqondisa kukadokotela kuphela.
